data.description: Berenberg lifts Porvair target price to 1,050p from 800p.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC urges SEE, VTYX, SNCY shareholders to discuss rights with the firm. Act fast. Contact by Jan 21, 2026.
data.description: Investors are advised to promptly get in touch with the company as there might be a restricted window to assert their rights. On January 21, 2026, Halper Sadeh LLC, a firm specializing in protecting investor interests, is examining a group of companies for potential breaches of federal securities laws and/or violations. Shareholders should take immediate action to explore their options. Please note the importance of timely engagement in such matters, given the current circumstances.
Court "Acknowledges Han Duck-soo's intent to disrupt constitutional order and awareness of riot"

data.title: CFTC Chair Selig names crypto lawyer as senior adviser; appoints two advisers, one involved in SEC no-action for custodians.
data.description: Michael Selig has recently hired two senior advisers, with one of them playing a significant role in creating a letter for a law firm that resulted in the SEC granting a no-action decision for crypto custodians.
Berenberg lifts Spirax-Sarco target price to 7,350p from 7,000p.
Berenberg lifts Vesuvius target price to 520p from 460p.

data.title: Investor rights law firm, Halper Sadeh LLC, asks CVGW, RAPT, CFLT shareholders to discuss rights. Contact them as there may be limited time.
data.description: Investors are urged to reach out to the company promptly as time may be running out to protect their rights. A reputable investor rights law firm, Halper Sadeh LLC, based in New York, announced on January 21, 2026, that they are looking into several companies for potential infractions of federal securities laws and/or breaches. It is crucial for shareholders to take action swiftly to ensure they are not disadvantaged.
Court "Han Duck-soo also guilty of fabricating false official document with 'post-facto declaration'"
Berenberg lifts Volex target price to 480p from 470p.
Berenberg lowers Admiral target price to 3,750p from 4,000p.
ROK Court: "Han Duck-soo appears to have urged Lee Sang-min to carry out power and water cuts"

data.title: Bitcoin search and social buzz dropped in 2025 despite high prices. Data from Jameson Lopp reveals a 33% decline in "Bitcoin" mentions from 2024.
data.description: On Tuesday, Jameson Lopp, a prominent figure in the Bitcoin community, revealed that the number of posts on social media platform X mentioning the term "Bitcoin" dropped by approximately 33% in 2025 when compared to the previous year, 2024.
OpenAI and the Gates Foundation unveil Horizon 1000, a $50 million program backing African health leaders with funding and technology.

data.title: Ahrefs launches AI prompt tracking in Brand Radar to monitor brand visibility in AI responses; ChatGPT reaches hundreds of millions weekly.
data.description: A popular marketing platform, Ahrefs, unveiled a new feature called custom AI prompt tracking in Brand Radar, designed to help teams monitor their brand's visibility in AI-generated responses on platforms such as ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity. With AI assistants emerging as a primary discovery channel, companies are keen on determining their brand's presence in AI-generated answers. According to OpenAI, ChatGPT now engages with hundreds of millions of users every week.
Canaccord Genuity lowers Netflix price target to $125 from $152.50.
Court "Accepts Han Duck-soo's Measures to Cut Off Electricity and Water to Lee Sang-min"
JPMorgan lifts IBM price target to $312 from $290.

data.title: Transparency in crypto trading key as Zoomex prioritizes asset custody and withdrawals.
data.description: In Victoria, Seychelles on January 21, 2026, the significance of transparency in crypto trading is on the rise with platforms being evaluated based on their handling of asset custody, settlement, and withdrawals. These aspects have become more critical for traders, surpassing product complexity in importance. This shift reflects the growing emphasis on clear and secure processes within the industry.
ROK Court: "The declaration of emergency martial law and issuance of the proclamation on December 3 constitute an act of rebellion"

data.title: Japanese bond market instability impacts global liquidity, causing pressure on risk assets. Concerns rise over tighter financial conditions.
data.description: Market turbulence in Japan's bond market has had a ripple effect worldwide, impacting risk assets and prompting worries about more restrictive financial conditions.
